$comment: Known-OK event_id pairs whose TSV content overlaps >=80% but are legitimately separate entries (e.g. same venue listed under two series). Used by scripts/check-duplicate-editions.js. Add an entry only after manually confirming the editions are NOT duplicates.
$review_needed: The pairs below are structural overlaps or data bugs flagged during the 2026-04 bulk duplicate audit. Each needs follow-up (noted inline).

pairs.note: Data bug: nagaragawa_aki (autumn) references nagaragawa_102's (summer) TSV. Needs a separate result.tsv for the 秋 edition before this can be consolidated.

Data bug: fujikawaguchiko 2024 edition's TSV contains omihachiman's data (winner 岩井 悠二/滋賀県). The actual Fujikawaguchiko 2024 data is missing; edit race-info.json to drop that edition or re-scrape when available.
Data bug: biwako 2022 edition's TSV matches omihachiman's (same winner/time). LAKE BIWA TRIATHLON (守山市) and びわ湖in近江八幡 are distinct races — one of the 2022 TSV references is wrong.

Structural: 2025 国スポ is registered both as a combined event (default.tsv) and as per-gender events (_men/_women). Best to restructure kokuspo_shiga with men+women categories and delete the split events.

Structural: 2025 70.3 WC had separate men and women races. im703_wc 2025 default.tsv currently contains only men (= im703_wc_men). Restructure im703_wc 2025 edition with men+women categories and delete im703_wc_men / im703_wc_women.
